ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Masayuki K. Oshita, in person, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Mr. Oshita regarding his responsibilities if appointed Executor. This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-26-1985 is admitted to probate. Masayuki Kenneth Oshita is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-08-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Aug-01-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
